summary:
Recovery: Excellent

Reading: Nothing's flagging this morning — your knees, joints, shoulders, neck, none of your usual sore spots are sending up a signal, so you're starting from clean ground. You're someone who rebuilds through steadiness and discipline rather than dramatic swings, and last night did exactly that for you — short on hours, but the system put that time to good use and came back calm and well ahead of where it usually sits.

Performance: Push hard. You woke up well above your normal baseline, so the engine's ready — just respect that sleep ran a touch short and keep your form clean if you reach for weight.

Transit: none
